subcodes.first_line: Say: I was sleeping, when the hand of grace awakened me; I was seated, when the decree of justice raised me up; and I was silent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل قد کنت راقدا ایقظتنی ید الفضل و کنت قاعدا اقامنی حکم العدل و کنت صامتا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
